title: AAICLAS Security Screener Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 158 Posts
organization: AAI Cargo Logistics and Allied Services Company Limited (AAICLAS) – A 100% subsidiary of Airports Authority of India
short_info: AAICLAS Security Screener Recruitment 2026: Get the latest AAICLAS recruitment notification 2026 for 158 Security Screener (Fresher) vacancies at AAI Cargo Logistics and Allied Services Company Limited (AAICLAS), a 100% subsidiary of Airports Authority of India, on Fixed Term Engagement Contract. The online application process starts on 18th May 2026 and the last date to apply online is 8th June 2026. Find AAICLAS vacancies across Dehradun, Kolkata, Patna, Trichy, Calicut and Udaipur on the official website www.aaiclas.aero. You can also get Free Job Alert of “Upcoming AAICLAS Security Screene

important_dates.interview_date: To be intimated on registered email ID and uploaded on www.aaiclas.aero

application_fee.details: Candidates are required to pay a non-refundable application fee online through net banking/credit cards/debit cards/UPI/Wallet etc. Bank charges/commission applicable for the selected mode of payment shall be borne by the candidate. Fee once paid shall not be refunded under any circumstances.

age_limit.age_details: Fixed Term Engagement Contract (FTC) – 3 Years (further extendable at sole discretion of AAICLAS Management based on performance)
age_limit.details: Age limit is calculated as on 01-05-2026. The date of birth as recorded in the Matriculation/Secondary Examination certificates will only be accepted. No subsequent requests for change in date of birth will be entertained.

qualification.details: Candidate must be a citizen of India. Candidates not willing to serve on All India Basis need not apply. Candidates who had been selected under previous AAICLAS advertisements in the last 3 years from the date of this advertisement and were terminated due to unsuccessful completion or failure in trainings/examinations need not apply. The eligibility criteria are as on 01-04-2026 (qualification) and 01-05-2026 (age). | While filling up the online form, candidates must enter the percentage of marks of Graduation in numeric form only (e.g. 60, 70, 80 etc.) and not in CGPA grade or any other format. | Educational Qualification | Job Profile | The selected candidates will carry out Screening of Cargo & In-line Hold Baggage by technical or other means, which includes identifying and/or carrying out other Security functions at Airport & Cargo Complexes.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 15,000/- per month (stipend period); reduced to Rs. 10,000/- per month on failure in 1st attempt of certification examinations

selection_process: Stage 1 Online Application submission at www.aaiclas.aero under "Career" column against Advt. No. 01/2026 on or before 08-06-2026
Stage 2 Shortlisting based on Graduation percentage (higher percentage called first in phased manner)
Stage 3 Online Interaction / Interview (date and mode intimated via registered email ID and AAICLAS website)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the AAICLAS official website www.aaiclas.aero by clicking on the "Apply Now" tab against Advertisement No. 01 of 2026 under the "Career" column. No application will be accepted after 08-06-2026. Applications received through Speed Post, Registered Post, Ordinary Post or Couriers will not be accepted. Only online applications will be accepted.

Candidates can apply for a single location only. Only a single application will be accepted from each candidate. The email ID entered in the application form must remain active until the engagement process is completed; no change in email ID will be allowed once entered. All communications by AAICLAS regarding this recruitment will be made only on the registered email ID of the candidates and not by post.

While filling the online form, percentage of marks of Graduation must be entered in numeric form only (e.g. 60, 70, 80 etc.) and not in CGPA grade or any other format. Candidates already working in any Government Department/PSU/Autonomous Body must produce an NOC from their present employer.
Documents to be Attached with the Online Application Form:
important_instructions: Candidates not willing to serve on All India Basis need not apply. Only a single application per candidate will be accepted and candidates can apply for a single location only. Candidates selected under previous AAICLAS advertisements in the last 3 years and terminated due to failure in trainings/examinations need not apply. Percentage of marks at Graduation must be entered in numeric form only; CGPA or any other format will not be accepted. All communications from AAICLAS will be made only on the registered email ID; candidates must keep checking their registered email regularly. No change in email ID will be allowed once entered in the application form. After selection, candidates must submit a surety bond of Rs. 1,50,000/- on non-judicial stamp paper of Rs. 100/- (duly notarized) for non-completion of the 3-year engagement period. The contract period of 3 years starts after passing all certification examinations and not from the date of joining on stipend. During stipend period only one casual leave per month shall be applicable on pro-rata basis. Maximum two attempts will be given for qualifying certification examinations; failure in both attempts leads to termination of Fixed Term Contract without further notice. Training costs for the 2nd attempt (if applicable) must be borne by the candidate; AAICLAS will only make the nomination. Notice period for resignation is minimum 3 months; those resigning with immediate effect must deposit 3 months' salary and no experience letter/verification will be issued. Candidates working in Govt./PSU/Autonomous Bodies must produce a NOC from their present employer. Furnishing false/incorrect information or suppression of material facts at any stage will result in cancellation of candidature or termination of engagement. No TA/DA or reimbursement shall be made by AAICLAS for the selection process. The job is transferable to any station due to operational requirements; place of posting can be changed to any location within India at sole discretion of AAICLAS Management. Any canvassing or bringing political/outside influence shall be treated as disqualification. All further announcements/details pertaining to this recruitment will be published only on www.aaiclas.aero and not by post. For queries, write to [email protected] mentioning Advt. No. and position applied for, or call helpdesk at 011-24667781.
